form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr2) over 1609m at The Meadows, beaten 12 m by Legacy's Casanova (1:58.00) in CDCLMW1NW3 on April 9 at $3.10. Showed ability the outing before when she won by 1.5 m as favourite (Fr4) at Monticello Raceway (1:59.00) beating Sweet Judy T in FMW1NW2EXT on March 26 at $2. Top-three finish is well within her grasp.
